description_long: This house complex is nestled among rugged, rocky terrain with lush patches of greenery and wildflowers. The structure features three distinct round towers with striking blue conical roofs, connected by wooden walkways and fencing. The central building has a half-timbered facade, reminiscent of traditional European architecture, and is surrounded by a small garden area. The rocky outcrops rise steeply around the buildings, partially enclosing the settlement and providing a natural barrier. The overall scene suggests a secluded, hillside village with a whimsical, storybook quality. The use of wood, stone, and plaster is evident in the construction, and the blue roofs stand out vividly against the natural stone and greenery.
description: A whimsical hillside house complex with blue conical roofs, timbered walls, and wooden walkways nestled among rocky outcrops and greenery.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry, three blue-roofed towers, timbered walls, garden, and wooden fences.
description_view_1: Rear view dominated by rocky cliffs, with only the tops of the blue roofs visible above the rocks.
description_view_2: Side view with steep rocky terrain mostly obscuring the buildings, only roof peaks visible.
description_view_3: Angled view showing the entry area, blue roofs, timbered facade, and more of the garden and fencing.
attribute_entryway_design: Wooden door with small steps, surrounded by fencing and a garden, no porch or columns, simple rustic style.
